title: Wraith Protocol | PUT & CALL VP Levels
author: kingshukghosh71
summary_bullets: TradingView indicator: Wraith Protocol | PUT & CALL VP Levels by kingshukghosh71.
This is a dual Volume Profile indicator built in Pine Script v5.

It computes two independent volume profiles — one for a "PUT" lookback window and one for a "CALL" lookback window — and extracts the three key auction market theory levels from each: the Value Area High (VAH), the Point of Control (POC), and the Value Area Low (VAL).
These levels are drawn as persistent horizontal lines across the chart with labeled price annotations, a colored histogram, and a summary data table.
